title: Command output inserts artificial newlines between stream chunks
reasoning:
Output events are rendered from arbitrary stream chunks, but the component maps every chunk to a separate line and then joins all entries with a newline. If a process emits stdout in chunks such as `hel` then `lo
`, the panel displays `hel
lo
` instead of `hello
`; if chunks already end with newlines, it also adds blank lines. That corrupts command output, which is especially risky for diagnostics and copy/paste from failing commands.
recommendation: Render stream output without adding separators between adjacent output chunks, or accumulate command output preserving chunk bytes and only add formatting around lifecycle/result/error records. If labels are required, add them only at stream boundaries or render metadata outside the raw output text.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The included tests cover findings, split-panel resizing, filters, and review queue behavior, but none render CommandPanel or assert preservation of streamed command chunks.
suggestedRegressionTest:
Add a CommandPanel test with two stdout stream entries whose chunks are `hel` and `lo
`, then assert the pre text contains `hello
` and not `hel
lo`.
minimumFixScope: src/renderer/src/components/CommandPanel.tsx plus a focused renderer test for streamed command output.

history.reasoning: The original evidence still exists in src/renderer/src/components/CommandPanel.tsx at current lines 42-57: stream output entries are mapped independently, output chunks are formatted as `${entryLabel(entry.event)}[${entry.event.stream}] ${entry.event.chunk}`, and all entries are then joined with `"\n"`. That still inserts an artificial newline between adjacent stream chunks and also adds an extra separator after chunks that already end in a newline. Searches found no CommandPanel-specific regression test for preserving split chunks such as `hel` + `lo\n`; existing renderer tests only assert labeled chunks are present and capped. The relevant existing tests pass, but they do not cover this corruption case, so the bug remains open.
commands: pnpm exec vitest run test/renderer/ClawpatchApp.test.tsx -t "renders lifecycle, stderr, and exit code for a failed fix|retains only the latest command stream entries"
